warmup_rule: Use D05-authorized real investment from 1925 onward; years before 1947 are warmup, not modeled observations.
inherited_vintage_rule: No inherited pre-D05-price capital stock is invented.
tail_truncation_rule: D01 untruncated Weibull convention with ages 0:200; no terminal service-life cliff at L; survival at L+1 remains positive and survival at age 200 is below 0.000001.
notes: pKN coverage begins in 1925 for ME; this is the longest D05-authorized price history available.
